Title: User Registration
Preconditions: User has not registered before.
Test Data: Valid email, password, name, and phone number.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the required information (email, password, name, and phone number).
3. Click on the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The user should be successfully registered and logged in.

Title: User Login
Preconditions: User has registered before.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the email and password.
3. Click on the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The user should be successfully logged in.

Title: Trip Registration
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: Valid destination, start date, end date, and interests.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the trip registration page.
2. Enter the required information (destination, start date, end date, and interests).
3. Click on the "Register Trip" button.
Expected Result: The trip should be successfully registered and displayed in the user's trips list.

Title: Update Trip Data
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a registered trip.
Test Data: Updated destination, start date, end date, or interests.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user's trips list.
2. Select the trip to be updated.
3. Click on the "Edit" button.
4. Update the required information.
5. Click on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The trip data should be successfully updated.

Title: Change User Profile
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: Updated email, password, name, or phone number.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user's profile page.
2. Click on the "Edit" button.
3. Update the required information.
4. Click on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The user's profile details should be successfully updated.

Title: View Trip
Preconditions: The user must have the app downloaded, must be logged in and have a trip already planned.
Test Steps:
1. The user presses the button “View trips”.
2. The user is presented a list of the planned trips.
3. The user selects a trip from the list.
Expected Result: The detailed travel plan for the selected trip is displayed.

Title: View Empty Trip List
Preconditions: The user must have the app downloaded, must be logged in but have no trips planned.
Test Steps: 1. The user presses the button “View trips”.
Expected Result: An empty list is displayed and the button to add a new trip is visible.

Title: Remove Trip
Preconditions: The user must have the app downloaded, must be logged in and have a trip already planned.
Test Steps:
1. The user selects a trip from the list of planned trips.
2. The user presses the button “Delete Trip” on the selected trip.
3. The user confirms the deletion.
Expected Result: The selected trip is removed from the database.

Title: Remove Empty Trip List
Preconditions: The user must have the app downloaded, must be logged in but have no trips planned.
Test Steps: 1. The user presses the button “Delete Trip” on the empty list of planned trips.
Expected Result: No action is taken and the empty list remains unchanged.

Title: View User Profile
Preconditions: The user must have the app downloaded and be logged in.
Test Steps: 1. The user presses the button with a person's icon that represents the “My Profile” button.
Expected Result: The user's profile is displayed.

Title: User Logout
Preconditions: The user must have the app downloaded and be logged in.
Test Steps: 1. The user presses the button “Log Out”.
Expected Result: The user is logged out and presented with the Login Page.

Title: Collaboration Model
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. Verify that each registered user is identified on the database through their username/email.
2. Verify that the user can add, remove, or change any travel plan.
Expected Result: The collaboration model functions as expected.

Title: Requirements Classes
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. Verify that the requirements are divided into durable and volatile requirements.
2. Verify that the requirements are further divided into functional and non-functional requirements.
Expected Result: The requirements classes are correctly defined.

Title: Change User Profile
Preconditions: User is already registered.
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the user's account.
2. Navigate to the "Profile" section.
3. Edit the user data.
4. Click on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The user's personal information is successfully updated.

Title: Check application performance
Preconditions: Application is installed and running on a device with sufficient resources.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate through the application's features.
3. Perform various operations within the application.
Expected Result: The application should respond quickly and perform all operations in a reasonable time.

Title: Check application usability
Preconditions: Application is installed and running on a device.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate through the application's features.
3. Attempt to perform various actions within the application.
Expected Result: The user should be able to interact with the application in a natural and intuitive way.

Title: Check punctuality of deliverables
Preconditions: The project is being developed.
Test Steps: 1. Check the project's progress against the set deadlines.
Expected Result: The project deliverables should be completed and submitted on time.

Title: Check knowledge of used languages
Preconditions: The project is being developed.
Test Steps: 1. Review the source code and graphics of the application.
Expected Result: The source code should be written in Kotlin, and the graphics and text management should be done using XML.

Title: Check data management and processing using Firebase
Preconditions: The application is running and connected to the internet.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Perform various operations within the application that involve data management and processing.
Expected Result: The data should be managed and processed efficiently using the Firebase database.

Title: Check internet connection requirement
Preconditions: The application is running.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Attempt to perform various actions within the application.
Expected Result: The application should require an internet connection to function.

Title: Check weather information requirement
Preconditions: The application is running and connected to the internet.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Perform various actions within the application that involve weather information.
Expected Result: The application should require weather information to function properly.

Title: Check data security
Preconditions: The application is running and connected to the internet.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Attempt to access sensitive user data within the application.
Expected Result: The sensitive user data should be encrypted and protected using a secure communication channel.

Title: User Registration
Preconditions: The application must be downloaded from the store and installed correctly on the phone.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Select the "Register" option.
3. Enter the required user details.
4. Click on the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The user should be able to register successfully and navigate within the application.

Title: Update User Data
Preconditions: The user must have registered successfully.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the user profile section.
3. Select the "Edit" option.
4. Update the required user details.
5. Click on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The user will have updated their information related to the application.

Title: Add Trip
Preconditions: The user must be correctly registered and have knowledge of the app requirements.
Test Data: Trip details (destination, start date, end date, etc.)
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the trip management section.
3. Click on the "Add Trip" button.
4. Enter the required trip details.
5. Click on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The trip is added to the user trips.

Title: Remove Trip
Preconditions:
The trip must exist
The user must be logged in to the app
Test Data: A valid trip to be removed
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the app as a user
2. Navigate to the trip to be removed
3. Select the "Remove Trip" option
4. Confirm the removal of the trip
Expected Result: The trip is no longer visible in the app
